source_jobs.title: Software Engineer (Java Backend)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world’s first AI wealth management platform. In just 9 months, Nevis has grown to have over $50 billion of assets under management on its platform and is on track to have over $100 billion by the end of this year.

Nevis is also backed by world leading investors and has raised a total of $40 million from Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit. Together it makes Nevis one of the highest funded and fastest growing Series A startups in Europe.




THE ROLE

We are looking for an exceptional Software Engineer (Backend) to join our world-class engineering team. In this role, you’ll design and build the high-performance systems and services that power Nevis’ AI-first wealth management platform.

You’ll be responsible for creating the robust backend infrastructure behind our intelligent workflows – developing APIs, microservices, and data pipelines that handle billions in assets. Working alongside engineers from top fintech companies like Revolut, you’ll operate at the frontier of technology and finance, building scalable systems with a focus on reliability, performance, and elegant design.

You’ll thrive here if you love working on greenfield systems, moving fast, and taking ownership end-to-end – from architecture to deployment.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and maintain scalable APIs and microservices that underpin Nevis’ platform.

 - Design and evolve distributed systems supporting core features like automation, integrations, and client operations.

 - Develop clean, maintainable, and efficient code using Java 17/21 with an emphasis on TDD, DDD, and CI/CD.

 - Own greenfield development while also improving and refactoring existing systems.

 - Ensure system reliability and performance through monitoring and observability.

 - Collaborate with cross-functional teams including AI engineers, product managers, and designers to ship impactful features.

 - Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and technical planning.




WHO YOU ARE

 - 6+ years’ experience in backend engineering, building high-performance, distributed systems.

 - Strong fluency in Java, with deep understanding of backend design patterns and principles.

 - Hands-on experience with microservice architecture, APIs, and database systems (PostgreSQL, Redis).

 - Solid foundation in computer science, mathematics, or related fields.

 - Comfortable working in cloud environments (AWS).

 - Fast learner with a results-driven, problem-solving mindset.

 - Excellent communication and team collaboration skills.

 - Fluent in English and comfortable in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.




NICE TO HAVE

 - Prior experience in financial services, fintech, or startups.

 - Exposure to product-focused engineering and building systems for scale.




WHY JOIN NEVIS?

 - Work alongside a high-calibre founding team backed by some of the best investors in the world.

 - A fast-paced, high-growth environment with the opportunity to shape how the business operates.

 - Be part of a mission-driven company transforming the wealth management industry with huge potential for global impact.

 - 25 days’ annual leave.

 - Private medical insurance.

 - Competitive salary and benefits package, including company equity.

source_jobs.title: Operations Manager (Product)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world’s first AI wealth management platform. We are building the system financial advisors will run on for the next decade. Our AI completes work, automates workflows end to end, and frees advisors to spend more time with clients. In the future, every wealth management firm will run on Nevis.

Nevis was founded by an exceptional team of ex-Revolut executives and has raised a total of $40 million from world leading investors including Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit.




THE ROLE

We are looking for a highly analytical and driven Operations Manager (Product) to work at the heart of Nevis’s Product teams. In this role, you’ll help shape the future of our AI-first wealth management platform by turning operational insights into scalable, data-driven decisions.

You’ll work closely with Product Managers, Engineers, and Leadership to solve complex business problems, identify growth opportunities, and design the operational foundations behind our key product initiatives. From launching new features and markets to analysing performance and defining go-to-market strategies, you’ll be a core part of how Nevis scales.

You’ll thrive here if you enjoy working at the intersection of product, data, and business strategy, and love tackling ambiguous problems with structure and precision.





WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Partner with Product & Engineering teams to define and execute operational strategies that drive product success.

 - Analyse key product, user, and financial metrics to identify inefficiencies and unlock new growth opportunities.

 - Translate insights into actionable plans that improve customer experience, scalability, and profitability.

 - Lead and deliver high-impact, cross-functional projects across product, AI, and operations.

 - Help define product strategy and go-to-market plans for new features and verticals.

 - Build scalable processes and frameworks for tracking product performance and operational efficiency.

 - Serve as the bridge between product development and business execution, ensuring alignment across teams.

 - Leverage SQL, Python, or other analytical tools to drive data-informed decisions.




WHO YOU ARE

 - 2+ years’ experience in operations, product strategy, consulting, or data-driven roles in high-growth environments.

 - STEM degree (or similarly quantitative discipline) from a top-tier university.

 - Exceptional analytical skills – strong proficiency with SQL, Excel, and preferably Python.

 - Highly structured thinker with strong problem-solving and critical reasoning skills.

 - Excellent communicator, capable of working cross-functionally with engineering, product, and leadership teams.

 - Strong business acumen and a deep curiosity for how products and systems work.

 - Thrives in a fast-paced, high-growth environment and takes ownership from idea to execution.

 - Fluent in English, both written and spoken.




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience in fintech, SaaS, or data-heavy products.

 - Background in strategy consulting, investment banking, or venture capital.

 - Familiarity with product analytics tools

 - Track record of building or scaling tech products using data and customer insights.




WHY JOIN NEVIS?

 - Work alongside a high-calibre founding team backed by some of the best investors in the world.

 - A fast-paced, high-growth environment with the opportunity to shape how the business operates.

 - Be part of a mission-driven company transforming the wealth management industry with huge potential for global impact.

 - 25 days’ annual leave.

 - Private medical insurance.

 - Competitive salary and benefits package, including company equity.

source_jobs.title: Product Owner (AI)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world’s first AI wealth management platform. We are building the system financial advisors will run on for the next decade. Our AI completes work, automates workflows end to end, and frees advisors to spend more time with clients. In the future, every wealth management firm will run on Nevis.

Nevis was founded by an exceptional team of ex-Revolut executives and has raised a total of $40 million from world leading investors including Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit..




THE ROLE

We are looking for an experienced and driven Product Owner to lead the development of Nevis’ AI-first product experiences. In this role, you will work at the intersection of machine learning, generative AI, product strategy, and user experience turning complex user problems into seamless intelligent automations for financial advisors and their teams.

You’ll work directly with best-in-class engineers and designers, define product requirements, shape the roadmap, drive execution and strategically decide on important trade-offs to deliver high-impact innovative features and products that supercharge our users and help them focus on clients instead of admin.

You’ll thrive here if you are obsessed with solving actual users' pain points, product quality and transformative AI technologies. If you like to move fast, have ‘get-it-done’ attitude, excel in bringing clarity to complex multi-dimensional problems and know how to navigate modern AI product development trade-offs.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own the AI product roadmap, driving prioritisation and execution of features that leverage Nevis’ intelligence layer.

 - Translate high-level business and user problems into clear, actionable product requirements, scope features and define priorities.

 - Manage a team of world-class engineers, designers and product builders. And be the ultimate owner of the final solution quality and delivery timelines.

 - Apply technological and product expertise together with first-principles thinking to define AI product development strategy.

 - Put users and solving users’ problems in front and center of the team's focus and goals. Formulate these goals in a set of clear and measurable success metrics.

 - Communicate priorities, insights, and progress clearly across the business, ensuring tight alignment between engineering, operations, and leadership.

 - Champion user experience and constantly working on making it even better
   


WHO YOU ARE

 - Hands on experience with LLMs

 - Proven track record of shipping impactful AI-native products, preferable at scale

 - Proven ability to manage engineering teams and navigate ML/Engineering system design decisions trade-offs

 - Passionate about transformative AI technologies, deep understanding of all modern Gen AI and agentic product development patterns, their pros and cons

 - Deep empathy for users and a track record of shipping impactful products with great UX

 - Excellent prioritisation, communication, and analytical skills.

 - Proactive and creative problem solver with "get it done" attitude

 - Thrive in a fast-paced, high-growth environment and take ownership end-to-end



NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience in fintech, wealth management, or financial services.

 - Prior experience in AI startups

 - Experience working with product designers and creating product with innovative UX




WHY JOIN NEVIS?

 - Work alongside a high-calibre founding team backed by some of the best investors in the world.

 - A fast-paced, high-growth environment with the opportunity to shape how the business operates.

 - Be part of a mission-driven company transforming the wealth management industry with huge potential for global impact.

 - Competitive salary and benefits package, including company equity.

source_jobs.title: GTM Associate
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world’s first AI wealth management platform. We are building the system financial advisors will run on for the next decade. Our AI completes work, automates workflows end to end, and frees advisors to spend more time with clients. In the future, every wealth management firm will run on Nevis.

Nevis was founded by an exceptional team of ex-Revolut executives and has raised a total of $40 million from world leading investors including Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit.




THE ROLE

We are hiring a GTM Associate to join our growing commercial team. This is a broad and hands on role where you will help build the foundation of our go to market efforts. You will work closely with sales, marketing, product, and the founding team to create pipeline, engage prospects, and support deals with some of the most sophisticated wealth management firms in the country.

This role is ideal for someone who wants to learn fast, work hard, and be part of an early stage team that is building a new category. You will gain exposure to enterprise sales, customer research, product feedback, and the full commercial motion of a rapidly scaling AI startup.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Develop a deep understanding of the Nevis platform and how advisors use our technology.

 - Qualify inbound interest and assess fit based on clear criteria.

 - Build thoughtful outbound sequences to key accounts and generate meetings for the sales team.

 - Research firms, decision makers, and industry trends to support sales strategy.

 - Partner with marketing to run targeted campaigns that increase lead volume.

 - Maintain accurate records and pipeline data in our CRM.

 - Prepare materials and pre-work for prospect meetings alongside Enterprise AEs and founders.

 - Share insights from conversations with prospects to influence messaging and product priorities.




WHO YOU ARE

 - BA or BS degree.

 - Strong verbal and written communication skills.

 - Ability to operate in a fast paced and constantly changing environment.

 - Curiosity about AI, financial services, and technology.

 - A team oriented mindset with a strong sense of ownership.

 - Previous experience in sales or outbound work is a plus but not required.




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience selling into RIAs, wealth management firms, custodians, or broader financial services.

 - Familiarity with AI or ML, data privacy, or enterprise information security.

 - Prior experience in Seed or Series A stage startups.




WHY JOIN NEVIS?

 - Work directly with a high calibre founding team backed by Sequoia, ICONIQ and Ribbit.

 - Build the commercial engine of one of the most ambitious AI companies in the world.

 - Operate in a fast moving environment where you have real ownership and responsibility.

 - Sell a product that is transforming an industry with trillions in assets.

 - The chance to define the future of wealth management and your own career trajectory.

source_jobs.title: Applied AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world’s first AI wealth management platform. In just 9 months, Nevis has grown to have over $50 billion of assets under management on its platform and is on track to have over $100 billion by the end of this year.

Nevis is also backed by world leading investors and has raised a total of $40 million from Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit. Together it makes Nevis one of the highest funded and fastest growing Series A startups in Europe.




THE ROLE

We are looking for a talented and driven AI Engineer to join our core team at Nevis where you will play a pivotal role in shaping the next-generation AI-first wealthtech product. You will address critical challenges faced by our business clients by building LLM-driven agentic automation pipelines.

You’ll work with cutting-edge LLM models and collaborate with leading vendors to enhance our product’s reasoning capabilities and elevate the quality of our models’ outputs to industry-leading standards - constantly raising the bar higher.

As part of a small, world-class team of engineers and product builders, including the former Head of AI at Revolut, you’ll have a unique opportunity to make a profound impact on one of the world’s largest industries.





WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Design and build LLM and ML-powered products and features across Nevis’ platform.

 - Collaborate with engineers and product builders to bring new AI capabilities from experiment to production.

 - Establish best practices and design novel approaches for AI development, testing, observability, and reliability.

 - Continuously monitor and improve AI products performance and reasoning quality.

 - Partner with product and design teams to prototype and iterate on new AI features and products.

 - Stay ahead of the latest advances in Gen AI space, including agentic systems, reasoning capabilities and context engineering.




WHO YOU ARE

 - Hands on experience with LLMs

 - Proven track record of solving real-world problems with AI / ML

 - Advanced statistical and data analysis skills

 - STEM degree from top university

 - Passionate about transformative AI technologies

 - Product-driven mindset: prioritizing practical ML solutions for better client outcomes

 - Proactive problem solver with "get it done" attitude

 - Excellent communication skills for effective team collaboration

 - Thrive in a fast-paced, high-growth environment and take ownership end-to-end




NICE TO HAVE

 - Prior experience in AI startups

 - Strong publications or GitHub profile




WHY JOIN NEVIS?

 - Work alongside a high-calibre founding team backed by some of the best investors in the world.

 - A fast-paced, high-growth environment with the opportunity to shape how the business operates.

 - Be part of a mission-driven company transforming the wealth management industry with huge potential for global impact.

 - 25 days’ annual leave.

 - Private medical insurance.

 - Competitive salary and benefits package, including company equity.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world’s first AI wealth management platform. We are building the system financial advisors will run on for the next decade. Our AI completes work, automates workflows end to end, and frees advisors to spend more time with clients. In the future, every wealth management firm will run on Nevis.

Nevis was founded by an exceptional team of ex-Revolut executives and has raised a total of $40 million from world leading investors including Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit.




THE ROLE

We are hiring our first Enterprise Account Executives to scale Nevis’ go to market motion. This is a rare opportunity to join a hyper growth AI startup at the earliest stage of commercialisation and own relationships with some of the most sophisticated wealth management firms in the US.

As an Enterprise AE, you will run the full sales cycle from outbound sourcing to multi threaded enterprise deals. You will partner directly with the CEO and founding team, work closely with product, and help shape how Nevis becomes the default AI platform for wealth management.

If you want to sell a category defining product, move fast, and close meaningful enterprise business, this role is for you.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own a new logo and expansion quota across top RIAs and private wealth management firms.

 - Build senior leadership and C-suite relationships, map complex organizations, and develop multi threaded deal strategies.

 - Conduct deep discovery, articulate clear ROI, and run pilots tied to measurable outcomes.

 - Build executive ready business cases and guide firms through procurement, due diligence, security, compliance, and legal review.

 - Manage deals end to end from prospecting and qualification through multi year enterprise agreements.

 - Collaborate with Post Sales to drive successful customer onboarding, renewals, and upsells.

 - Provide structured feedback to product and GTM teams to influence roadmap and positioning.

 - Consistently deliver ARR targets while maintaining a high quality, well managed pipeline.




WHO YOU ARE

 - 5+ years selling and closing complex SaaS deals, ideally in enterprise or regulated industries.

 - A track record of closing 500k to 1M ARR deals and hitting quota in high growth environments.

 - Strong command of enterprise sales frameworks such as MEDDPICC or Command of the Message.

 - Ability to simplify advanced AI concepts and communicate clear ROI to executives.

 - Obsessed with pipeline generation and disciplined deal management.

 - A startup mindset. Autonomous, adaptable, fast moving, and hungry to win.

 - Excellent communicator who can work cross functionally with product and engineering.

 - Comfortable with ambiguity and excited to build the early sales foundation of a company.




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience selling into RIAs, wealth management firms, custodians, or broader financial services.

 - Familiarity with AI or ML, data privacy, or enterprise information security.

 - Prior experience in Seed or Series A stage startups.




WHY JOIN NEVIS?

 - Work directly with a high calibre founding team backed by Sequoia, ICONIQ and Ribbit.

 - Build the commercial engine of one of the most ambitious AI companies in the world.

 - Operate in a fast moving environment where you have real ownership and responsibility.

 - Sell a product that is transforming an industry with trillions in assets.

 - The chance to define the future of wealth management and your own career trajectory.

source_jobs.title: SMB Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world’s first AI wealth management platform. We are building the system financial advisors will run on for the next decade. Our AI completes work, automates workflows end to end, and frees advisors to spend more time with clients. In the future, every wealth management firm will run on Nevis.

Nevis was founded by an exceptional team of ex-Revolut executives and has raised a total of $40 million from world leading investors including Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit.




THE ROLE

As one of Nevis's founding SMB Account Executives, you'll play a pivotal role building and scaling the high velocity side of Nevis’s GTM motion. You will focus on smaller, fast growing RIAs and independent advisory firms who are ready to adopt AI into their workflow.

This is a rare opportunity to build an entire motion from the ground up. You will own the full sales cycle, test and refine messaging, run fast evaluations, and help shape how Nevis delivers value to smaller and mid sized firms. You will partner directly with the founding team, work closely with product, and play a critical role in defining the future of our commercial engine.

If you want to sell a product that customers genuinely love, move with speed, and build a scalable new business segment, this role is a perfect fit.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Own a book of business across warm inbound leads and a targeted SMB account list.

 - Run a high velocity sales motion while maintaining a consultative, solution oriented approach.

 - Manage the full sales cycle from prospecting and qualification to evaluation and contracting.

 - Build clear and compelling ROI narratives grounded in advisor workflows and operational pain points.

 - Deliver tailored demos and product presentations that help prospects understand value quickly.

 - Develop strong relationships with firm owners, operations leads, and senior advisors.

 - Work cross functionally with product and engineering to communicate customer needs, product gaps, and market insights.

 - Create repeatable tactics, messaging, and collateral that improve the performance of the SMB sales team.

 - Maintain accurate pipeline management, forecasting, and CRM hygiene.

 - Meet and exceed revenue targets and activity expectations with consistency.
   
   


WHO YOU ARE

 - Proven experience selling software or SaaS with success in high velocity or SMB motions.

 - Ability to run a full sales cycle independently from first touch to close.

 - Strong communication skills and the ability to articulate technical concepts to non technical audiences.

 - A disciplined operator who can manage pipeline, forecast accurately, and stay organised.

 - Excited by the mission of using AI to transform how work gets done in wealth management.

 - A team player who collaborates effectively across sales, product, and leadership.

 - Energised by building new processes, improving playbooks, and contributing to team culture.
   
   


WHY JOIN NEVIS

 - Work directly with a high calibre founding team backed by Sequoia, ICONIQ and Ribbit.

 - Build the SMB motion of one of the most ambitious AI companies in the world.

 - Operate in a fast moving environment where you have real ownership and responsibility.

 - Sell a product that is reshaping an industry with trillions in assets and massive inefficiencies.

 - The opportunity to define the future of AI in wealth management and grow your career at the same time.

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer (Python Backend)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world’s first AI wealth management platform. We are building the system financial advisors will run on for the next decade. Our AI completes work, automates workflows end to end, and frees advisors to spend more time with clients. In the future, every wealth management firm will run on Nevis.

Nevis was founded by an exceptional team of ex-Revolut executives and has raised a total of $40 million from world leading investors including Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit.




THE ROLE

We are looking for an exceptional Software Engineer (Python) to help build the AI platform that powers intelligent workflows for the world’s top financial firms.

In this role, you will design and implement the Python systems, services, and orchestration layers that accelerate AI development across Nevis. You’ll work across applied AI, data pipelines, model execution frameworks, agentic systems, retrieval infrastructure, and backend components that support our AI products.

You’ll thrive here if you love building production-grade AI platforms, care about performance and reliability, and want to work on systems that move from idea to production in days. You’ll be joining a world-class engineering team with deep experience building AI systems at scale.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and evolve Nevis’ Python-based AI platform, powering core workflows and agentic automation.

 - Develop model orchestration, data processing pipelines, retrieval systems, and execution runtimes for applied AI features.

 - Create scalable APIs, services, and internal tools enabling rapid development, evaluation, and deployment of AI systems.

 - Architect robust systems for model inference, prompt execution, vector retrieval, and multi-step agent reasoning.

 - Maintain high engineering standards through clean code, testing, observability, and CI/CD.

 - Collaborate closely with AI engineers, product managers, and designers to ship features used by thousands of clients.

 - Own greenfield AI platform components from architecture through production rollout.

 - Participate in design reviews, code reviews, and technical debates that shape the future of Nevis’ technical direction.




WHO YOU ARE

 - 4+ years of experience in Python engineering, ideally building AI platforms, ML infrastructure, or applied AI products.

 - Deep expertise in Python, asynchronous programming, system design, and backend engineering fundamentals.

 - Hands-on experience building production systems involving:
   
   - LLM orchestration or agent frameworks (Pydantic, LangChain, custom orchestration).
   
   - Data pipelines, ETL, embeddings, or vector search
   
   - Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) or model-backed workflows
   
   - High-performance APIs and distributed services

 - Strong understanding of modern cloud environments (AWS preferred).

 - Solid foundation in computer science, distributed systems, or related fields.

 - Fast learner with a bias for action and a strong ownership mindset.

 - Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

 - Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience shipping applied AI or ML-powered products in production.

 - Knowledge of vector databases, feature stores, or streaming systems.

 - Background in fintech, financial services, wealth management, or startups.




WHY JOIN NEVIS?

 - Work alongside a world-class founding team backed by Sequoia, ICONIQ, and Ribbit.

 - Build core systems at a hyper-growth AI startup redefining wealth management.

 - Fast-paced environment with huge scope for ownership, impact, and career growth.

 - Mission-driven culture with global industry-changing potential.

 - 25 days’ annual leave.

 - Private medical insurance.

 - Competitive salary and benefits, including company equity.

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer (Frontend)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world’s first AI wealth management platform. In just 9 months, Nevis has grown to have over $50 billion of assets under management on its platform and is on track to have over $100 billion by the end of this year.

Nevis is also backed by world leading investors and has raised a total of $40 million from Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit. Together it makes Nevis one of the highest funded and fastest growing Series A startups in Europe.



THE ROLE

We are looking for a Software Engineer (Frontend) who obsesses over the details, who sees interfaces as craft, not just code.

You’ll play a key role in designing and developing Nevis’ core product – the world’s first AI-native wealth management platform – and will bring our intelligent workflows to life for financial advisors across the globe.

You'll work closely with designers and backend engineers to bring ideas to life — fast. If you love modern web tech, care about design quality, and want to ship the product that matters, you'll thrive here.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Collaborate with designers to build features that look and feel exceptional.

 - Turn complex AI and financial data into interfaces that just make sense.

 - Write clean, tested, reusable code – and help others do the same.

 - Shape our design system and raise the bar for frontend craft.

 - Prototype quickly, learn from feedback, and iterate.

 - Work with backend engineers to integrate APIs and bring data to life.

 - Obsess over performance, accessibility, and the details users notice.




WHO YOU ARE

 - You have deep experience with TypeScript and understand how JavaScript really works

 - You have extensive experience with React and are eager to use cutting-edge features

 - You think deeply about component design: composable APIs, clear boundaries, and abstractions that other developers love to use

 - You understand the modern web: browsers, performance, and what makes interfaces feel fast

 - You're comfortable with modern tooling: Vite, SCSS, component libraries, monorepos

 - You know how to ship features from scratch and get apps live

 - You obsess over craft: clean code, polished UI, and experiences users love

 - You move fast, take ownership, and learn constantly

 - You make the team better: lifting others up while pushing for high standards

 - You leverage AI to work smarter and solve problems faster

 - You're a strong communicator, fluent in English and comfortable working async

 - You give and receive feedback with honesty and care




NICE TO HAVE

 - A portfolio or GitHub that shows what you've built.

 - Strong instincts for debugging and performance tuning.

 - Exposure to AI-powered interfaces or data-rich products.




WHY JOIN NEVIS?

 - Work alongside a high-calibre founding team backed by some of the best investors in the world.

 - A fast-paced, high-growth environment with the opportunity to shape how the business operates.

 - Be part of a mission-driven company transforming the wealth management industry with huge potential for global impact.

 - 25 days’ annual leave.

 - Private medical insurance.

 - Competitive salary and benefits package, including company equity.

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world’s first AI wealth management platform. In just 9 months, Nevis has grown to have over $50 billion of assets under management on its platform and is on track to have over $100 billion by the end of this year. Nevis is also backed by world leading investors and has raised a total of $40 million from Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit. Together it makes Nevis one of the highest funded and fastest growing Series A startups in Europe.




THE ROLE

We are looking for a mission-driven Customer Success Manager to help make our customer base fall in love with our products. In this role, you will act as the human interface between our Product team and the community of Registered Investment Advisors (RIAs) that use Nevis every day.

You’ll work directly with some of the most accomplished investment professionals in the world to ensure they can make the most of Nevis, turbocharge their operations and enable them to spend less time at their desk and more with their clients.

You’ll also be in charge of the feedback loop that brings fresh and non-obvious insights from the field into our offices. You’ll work closely with a hyper-talented team of AI engineers, researchers and designers to help build the next generation of AI-powered solutions for the wealth management industry.

You’ll thrive here if you are genuinely obsessed with empowering people with elegant, cutting-edge technology and if solving problems for others fast puts a smile on your face at the end of the day.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own the relationship with Nevis’ actual daily users, from onboarding to power-user award.

 - Build processes and tools to monitor and drive engagement with our products.

 - Research all the possible ways in which Nevis works and does not work for our customers by observing and talking directly with them. A lot.

 - Document and introduce new products and features to customers to ensure they are fully understood and used.

 - Collect, structure and deliver insightful product feedback to the most relevant stakeholders within our Product team.

 - Provide relevant, granular and timely insights to help our founders and team members prioritize at all levels - from commercial strategy to new product development.




WHO YOU ARE

 - You have 4+ years of experience in strategy consulting or in client-facing roles within high-growth tech companies.

 - You have excellent communication skills and exceptional EQ: empathic, thoughtful and to the point. People can’t wait to have a question for you.

 - You are a practical problem-solver.

 - You have a borderline-pathological obsession with productivity - Both personal and professional.

 - Spending time with others and helping them do their best work gives you energy. You love hearing people say “wow” in response to what you have to show them.

 - You are the one telling your friends and family about new tech products and how to use them.

 - You are excited about the Wealth Management industry.




NICE TO HAVE

 - You are based in the United States and like to travel.

 - You have prior experience building tech products.

 - You have prior experience in the Wealth Management industry - as a worker, as a client, or both.
   
   


WHY JOIN NEVIS?

 - Work alongside a high-calibre founding team backed by some of the best investors in the world.

 - A fast-paced, high-growth environment with the opportunity to shape how the business operates.

 - Be part of a mission-driven company transforming the wealth management industry with huge potential for global impact.

 - Private medical insurance.

 - Competitive salary and benefits package, including company equity.

source_jobs.title: Founder's Associate (CEO Office)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world's leading AI platform for wealth management. Our AI completes work, automates workflows end to end, and frees financial advisors to spend more time with clients. In the future, every wealth management firm will run on Nevis.

Founded by an exceptional team of ex-Revolut executives, Nevis has raised $40 million from Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ, and Ribbit Capital. We work exclusively with the largest and fastest-growing wealth management firms in the United States.




THE ROLE

Founder's Associates work directly with the CEO and founders of Nevis on the most strategic initiatives in the business. You will be part of a small, elite team operating out of the CEO Office, embedded at the highest level of the company, with direct visibility into every major decision Nevis makes.

We are looking for exceptional people who have consistently delivered in high-stakes environments and want to do the most impactful work of their career. You have real demonstrated performance behind you, whether as a founder, operator, or top-tier professional. If you are motivated by the chance to shape one of the fastest-growing AI companies in the world and have a track record that proves you can, we want to talk to you.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Work directly with the CEO and founders on the most strategic customer and commercial initiatives across the business.

 - Own enterprise deployments end-to-end at the largest wealth management firms in the US, from initial engagement through to full AI rollout and expansion.

 - Serve as the trusted advisor and primary point of contact for C-suite and senior leadership at firms managing $50B to $500B+ in AUM.

 - Build board-ready presentations and rigorous business cases that identify the largest AI opportunities within a firm, and drive those initiatives internally from alignment through to live deployment.

 - Lead and coordinate across engineering, product, and customer teams to ensure complex, high-visibility deployments are executed with precision and speed.

 - Immerse yourself in customer data and workflows to define where Nevis AI agents will deliver the highest leverage, and partner with engineers to make it happen.

 - Communicate with clarity and authority across all levels of the organization, from analyst teams to managing partners and boards of directors.

 - Feed what you learn in the field directly into the Nevis product roadmap, shaping how the platform evolves for every future customer.


WHO YOU ARE

Performance is everything here. We are looking for people who have been at the top of every environment they have entered.

 - 3 to 8 years at a top-tier firm in management consulting, investment banking, private equity, or a high-growth technology startup. You have operated at the highest level in your field and have the track record to prove it.

 - Degree in a STEM or related field from a top-tier university. Academic excellence is expected.

 - A killer operator. You thrive in fast-paced, high-pressure environments, take extreme ownership, and get things done without being told twice.

 - An outstanding communicator. You write and speak with precision and authority. You can command the room in a C-suite presentation and earn trust with a technical engineering team in the same day.

 - Able to translate complex and highly technical concepts, including the latest AI developments, to both technical and non-technical audiences without losing either room.

 - Strong bias for action. You do not wait for perfect information. You move fast, course-correct quickly, and always keep momentum.

 - A natural influencer. You build relationships and drive alignment across functions and levels, without relying on authority to do it.

 - Based in or willing to relocate to New York City. Comfortable with regular travel to client sites across the United States.

 - Authorized to work in the United States.


NICE TO HAVE

 - Familiarity with the US wealth management landscape

source_jobs.title: Deployment Strategist, Enterprise
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Nevis is building the world's leading AI platform for wealth management. Our AI completes work, automates workflows end to end, and frees financial advisors to spend more time with clients. In the future, every wealth management firm will run on Nevis.

Founded by an exceptional team of ex-Revolut executives, Nevis has raised $40 million from Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ, and Ribbit Capital. We work exclusively with the largest and fastest-growing wealth management firms in the United States.




WHAT WE'RE ABOUT

At its core, the Deployment Strategist role is about turning one of the most significant technological shifts in financial services into a commercial reality. The largest wealth management firms in the United States know that AI will transform how they operate. They come to Nevis with a belief that the only way to serve more clients, retain more assets, and scale their business is to fundamentally change how their advisors work. Deployment Strategists are responsible for making that belief a reality.

This is an intensely commercial role. You will own some of the largest and most complex enterprise deals in the wealth management industry, end-to-end. That means understanding a firm's business deeply enough to identify where AI creates the most value, building the business case that compels their leadership to act, and then leading the deployment that delivers it. You will be the person our customers trust most, and the person internally who ensures that trust is never misplaced.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

No two days are the same, but you can expect to:

 - Own the largest enterprise deals in US wealth management end-to-end, from first commercial conversation through to full AI deployment and account expansion.

 - Go onsite with senior leadership at firms managing $10B to $500B+ in AUM to understand their most critical workflows, identify their biggest operational problems, and define where Nevis creates the most value.

 - Build rigorous business cases and board-ready presentations that translate AI capability into commercial outcomes, and use them to drive internal alignment and executive buy-in at the customer.

 - Partner with Forward Deployed Engineers to scope, configure, and deploy AI agents and automated workflows that handle thousands of advisor tasks per day.

 - Lead complex, multi-stakeholder deployment projects simultaneously, coordinating across customer teams, Nevis engineers, and senior leadership with precision and speed.

 - Serve as the trusted primary point of contact for C-suite executives, CEOs, COOs, CTOs, throughout every stage of the commercial relationship.

 - Identify opportunities to expand Nevis's footprint within each account, developing proposals that grow deal value and deepen the customer relationship.

 - Embed what you learn from deployments back into the Nevis product, shaping the roadmap and helping us build a better platform for every future customer.

 - Build and deliver compelling demos that open new relationships and expand existing ones across the US wealth management landscape.




WHAT WE VALUE

 - Commercial sharpness. You understand how enterprise deals are structured and won, and you bring that thinking to every customer interaction.

 - People with demonstrated performance and real outcomes behind them, not just impressive experience on paper.

 - Relentless curiosity. You are never satisfied with a surface-level answer and will dig into the data, the workflow, and the business until you truly understand what is happening.

 - Low ego and high ownership. You do what needs to be done. The outcome matters more than the credit.

 - Comfort with ambiguity. The problems we face are novel and unstructured. You bring clarity to them, not frustration.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We are looking for people with demonstrated performance and real outcomes behind them. You may have come from a deployment or implementation role at an enterprise software company, a commercial role

source_jobs.title: Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEVIS

Wealth management is about people and relationships. But the industry is so complex and regulated that advisors spend less than 30% of their time actually serving clients. The rest goes to paperwork and admin overhead.

Nevis exists to change that. We are building the world's first AI wealth management platform that completes work, automates workflows end-to-end and gives advisors back the time to focus on clients.

Nevis was founded by an exceptional team of ex-Revolut executives and has raised a total of $40 million from world leading investors including Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit.




THE ROLE

Design is foundational to our product. We are making complex operational workflows feel simple, and replacing the decades-old advisor software with modern AI-first tools.

We are looking for an exceptional Product Designer who is excited by building a category-defining product.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own the design in your product area, from problem definition to shipping.

 - Move fast, ship often and see your work in the hands of real users.

 - Talk to advisors to understand their problems and inform your design.

 - Design and prototype in Figma and AI tools like Claude Code and Cursor.

 - Use and improve our design system, raising the bar for consistency and quality.

 - Give and receive direct feedback and iterate toward the best solution.




WHO YOU ARE

Systems thinking

 - You simplify complexity. You take a multi-step, high-stakes workflow and turn it into something clear and obvious.

 - You have prior experience designing complex multi-user products with high data density.

Speed

 - You can just do things. You don't wait for the brief to be perfect to get moving.

 - You work hard and ship daily. You'd rather put something in front of users than spend weeks discussing it.

Quality

 - You care deeply about visual design, interactions and writing.

 - You believe good design is defined by clarity, simplicity and execution.

Working style

 - You are comfortable with ambiguity, and partner with Product Owners and Engineers to define what to build, not just how.

 - You ask hard questions, challenge ideas and advocate for what you think is right.




WHY JOIN NEVIS?

 - Work alongside a high-caliber team backed by some of the best investors in the world

 - A fast-paced, high-growth environment with real ownership

 - Be part of a mission-driven company transforming the wealth management industry with huge potential for global impact

 - Competitive salary and meaningful equity in one of the fastest growing startups

 - Private medical insurance
